name: Gamma Supreme Overgrip 3-Pack
description: The Gamma Supreme Overgrip provides a tacky, moisture-absorbing surface that keeps your paddle secure in sweaty conditions. This 3-pack of thin overgrips wraps easily over your existing grip without adding bulk, and each grip lasts approximately 10-15 hours of play.
care_instructions: Overgrips are consumable — replace when tackiness fades or the grip becomes slippery. Store unused grips in the sealed packaging to preserve tackiness.
